name: @canton-vc/adapter-persona
description: Persona KYC provider adapter for canton-vc. Wraps Persona's JSON:API inquiry endpoints (Bearer auth, Persona-Version-pinned request envelope, JSON:API relationships) with the Persona-Signature webhook scheme (HMAC-SHA256 over `<ts>.<rawBody>` with key rotation support) behind the vendor-agnostic KycProvider interface. Third production reference adapter alongside @canton-vc/adapter-didit and @canton-vc/adapter-sumsub; covers the JSON:API + async-inquiry pattern as a third structurally distinct vendor shape.
author: Abdullah Faruk Özden <abdullahfarukozden@gmail.com> (https://github.com/Farukest)
